verdict_reasoning: GRP78/BiP is canonically an ER-luminal HSP70 chaperone, but a well-documented cell-surface pool (csGRP78) appears on tumor cells and stressed cells, driven by ER-stress / UPR / oncogenic transformation. csGRP78 is an active oncology target with antibody, ADC, and CAR-T programs engaging it on the tumor cell surface. Baseline localization is ER lumen; surface display is stress/cancer-induced.
